results.name: COUSR3A
results.content:
COUSR3A DFHMDI COLUMN=1,                                               -
               LINE=1,                                                 -
               SIZE=(24,80)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Tran:'
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(1,7)
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date:'
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog:'
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,7)
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time:'
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT),                                      -
               COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(4,35),                                             -
               INITIAL='Delete User'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               LENGTH=14,                                              -
               POS=(6,6),                                              -
               INITIAL='Enter User ID:'
USRIDIN DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,UNPROT),                            -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(6,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(6,30)
        DFHMDF COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=70,                                              -
               POS=(8,6),                                              -
               INITIAL='***********************************************-
               ***********************'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(11,6),                                             -
               INITIAL='First Name:'
FNAME   DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(11,18)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(11,39)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=10,                                              -
               POS=(13,6),                                             -
               INITIAL='Last Name:'
LNAME   DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(13,18)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(13,39)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(15,6),                                             -
               INITIAL='User Type: '
USRTYPE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=1,                                               -
               POS=(15,17)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=17,                                              -
               POS=(15,19),                                            -
               INITIAL='(A=Admin, U=User)'
ERRMSG  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT,FSET),                                 -
               COLOR=RED,                                              -
               LENGTH=78,                                              -
               POS=(23,1)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=58,                                              -
               POS=(24,1),                                             -
               INITIAL='ENTER=Fetch  F3=Back  F4=Clear  F5=Delete'
        DFHMSD TYPE=FINAL
        END
*
* Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-70-g193b394-123 Date: 2022-08-22 17:02:44 CDT
*

results.name: CSSETATY
results.summary: copybook CSSETATY in CSSETATY.cpy. comment hint: Copyright Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates..
results.content:

      ****************************************************************** 
      *    Set (TESTVAR1) to red if in error and * if blankACSHLIM
           IF (FLG-(TESTVAR1)-NOT-OK                                 
           OR  FLG-(TESTVAR1)-BLANK)                                    
           AND CDEMO-PGM-REENTER                                        
               MOVE DFHRED             TO 
                    (SCRNVAR2)C OF (MAPNAME3)O
               IF  FLG-(TESTVAR1)-BLANK                                 
                   MOVE '*'            TO 
                    (SCRNVAR2)O OF (MAPNAME3)O
               END-IF                                                   
           END-IF 
      *
      * Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-15-g27d6c6f-68 Date: 2022-07-19 23:15:58 CDT
      *
